My Booth

⚠ Your booth photos are over 60 days old. Fresh photos help attract customers — consider updating them!

Showcase your booth to customers browsing our website. Add photos or a short video of your booth, write a description of what you offer, and publish it for the world to see.

Not Published
When published, your booth will appear on the public Booths page

Booth Details

0 / 2000

Booth Photos

Add at least one photo of your booth. Your first photo will be used as the hero banner on your landing page. Show off your displays, products, and personality! (Max 8 photos, 5MB each)

Click to add photos or drag and drop

JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP — up to 5MB each

Booth Video (Optional)

Add a short video tour of your booth. Keep it under 30 seconds for the best experience. (Max 50MB)

Click to upload a video

MP4, MOV, or WebM — up to 50MB

Vendor Landing Page

$10/mo Add-On

Your own page on the Bowenstreet Market website. Share your link to grow your brand, get found on search engines, and connect with customers directly.

Your landing page is not yet activated. Contact the market office to get started for $10/month.

Your Page URL

Choose a custom URL for your landing page. This is the link you can share on social media, business cards, etc.

bowenstreetmm.com/v/
YOUR PAGE LINK

About Your Business

Tell your story in more detail. This is your chance to connect with customers and share what makes you unique.

0 / 5000

Contact Information

Add your contact details so customers can reach you directly. All fields are optional — only share what you are comfortable with.

Social Media

Link your social accounts so customers can follow you. Your socials will be displayed alongside the market's socials on your landing page.

Social Feed Embed

Embed your Facebook timeline and/or Instagram profile on your landing page so visitors can see your latest posts and follow you directly.

Make sure your Facebook and Instagram URLs are filled in above. Facebook pages must be public for the embed to work.

SEO Settings

Help search engines find your page. These will appear in Google search results.

0 / 500

FAQ Section

Frequently asked questions help search engines understand your page and show up in Google's "People Also Ask" and AI search results. Each Q&A pair should answer something a real customer would search for.

0 / 8000

🎨 Page Design

Customize how your landing page looks. Pick a template layout, choose your colors, and select fonts — or let the AI design assistant help you create a look that matches your style.

Classic
Classic
Modern
Boutique
Boutique
Minimal

✨ AI Design Assistant

Tell the AI what vibe you're going for and it will design your page. You can say things like "warm and rustic" or "clean and modern with blue accents."
